color_gradient_violation_cell_label: Which labeled swatch breaks the color progression pattern?
Identify the swatch label that does not fit the color progression.
One swatch interrupts the smooth color progression. Which label marks it?
Use the row and column color changes to find the out-of-pattern swatch. Which label is it?
Which labeled cell has the color that violates the swatch-grid progression?
linear_gradient_completion_label: Which labeled option completes the missing swatch in the color gradient?
Choose the option label whose color fits the blank position in the gradient row.
One swatch is missing from the linear color progression. Which option belongs there?
Use the colors before and after the blank swatch to pick the completing option label.
Which labeled color option should replace the blank swatch?

query:color_gradient_violation_cell_labe.answer_instruction: the single capital-letter label of the swatch that breaks the progression
query:color_gradient_violation_cell_labe.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] for that swatch cell.

query:linear_gradient_completion_label.answer_instruction: the single capital-letter label of the option that completes the color gradient
query:linear_gradient_completion_label.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] for the selected option swatch.
